author: y4rr
content: Observed effect: image 1 OK (was: 0/1 dets); image 3 OK n_det_ratio=0.889 (was 0.5); image 4 OK kp_diff=0.154 px (was 9.6 px); image 5 score_max_abs=0.0245 still over 0.02 threshold. Cause is rank-4 score f32 drift on a borderline person detection (rust 0.061 vs tv 0.096 for the same physical small box at [877,172,948,258]); same f32-accumulation noise n_det_ratio handles in fcos/retinanet. Top-3 scores now match to <0.014 abs vs <0.06 pre-fix; all matched keypoint pairs <2 px mean diff vs <12 px pre-fix.
